title: Data related to the publication: Mortality of ground beetles (Coleoptera, Carabidae) in discarded containers - evidence from urban forests
author: Godzińska, Daria
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Data associated with the article: Mortality of ground beetles (Coleoptera, Carabidae) in discarded containers - evidence from urban forests 
   
 DaneiNEXT.slsx and Species richness by iNext.R - files corresponding to s ample size based rarefaction and extrapolation curves for species richness and sample coverage with 95% confidence intervals  for ground beetle assemblage collected by container sampling and pitfall traps (Fig.2)  
  PERMANOVA - Bary - proportions.R and PERMAOVA - Raup.R - files corresponding to two-way PERMANOVA for the effect of sampling method and site on the qualitative similarity (Raup-Crick distance for species presence/absence) and quantitative similarity (Bray-Curtis distance for relative species abundance) in species composition (Table 1, Fig. 3, Appendix Fig. 3-4).  
  Statistical analyses are described in detail in the article
